title: Use of anmnesia inducing drugs to repeatedly watch NGE
display_title: Use of anmnesia inducing drugs to repeatedly watch NGE
wikitext:
[]: Use of anmnesia-inducing drugs to repeatedly watch NGE Post by Mindless » Tue Aug 16, 2011 9:15 pm I am curious about the possibility of legally using amnesia-inducing drugs to repeatedly enjoy an anime. Has anyone done this before? What drugs would you suggest? Benzodiazepines seem to have a lot of side effects but might be the most accessible. All suggestions welcome : ).

[]: Post by esselfortium » Tue Aug 16, 2011 10:42 pm

[]: Post by KnightmareX13 » Tue Aug 16, 2011 11:40 pm [url]http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=3208[/url] [url]http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=11317[/url]

[]: Post by Mindless » Tue Aug 16, 2011 11:50 pm The point isn't to enhance the experience but to allow you to repeat the experience without becoming used to it and not enjoying it as much.

[]: Post by BornIn1142 » Wed Aug 17, 2011 2:16 am Dude, drugs aren't going to work for you. I'm not even sure that's safe. A blow to your head though, that'll do it.

[]: Post by CJD » Wed Aug 17, 2011 2:53 am BornIn1142 wrote: Dude, drugs aren't going to work for you. I'm not even sure that's safe. A blow to your head though, that'll do it.

[]: Post by Xard » Wed Aug 17, 2011 3:03 am Why on Earth would I or anyone else to do that, then I'd have to spend years figuring it out all over again

[]: Post by SaltyJoe » Wed Aug 17, 2011 5:11 am Mindless wrote: The point isn't to enhance the experience but to allow you to repeat the experience without becoming used to it and not enjoying it as much.

[]: Post by Azathoth » Wed Aug 17, 2011 9:59 am Xard wrote: Why on Earth would I or anyone else to do that, then I'd have to spend years figuring it out all over again

[]: Post by Reichu » Thu Aug 18, 2011 10:03 pm Since better to explain the lock late than never: It's for similar reasons as the locked hallucinogens thread linked a few posts down. You're asking how you can induce memory loss . While that's your business, it's not the kind of discussion we particularly endorse around here. I don't doubt there are fora out there devoted specifically to non-mainstream chemical mind alteration.
